title: 🔥华尔街增量打破僵局
body: 市场正处于存量博弈向增量转化的节点。摩根士丹利推出低费率比特币ETF，首日成交量达3400万美元。作为管理6.2万亿美元资产的巨头，其入场验证了传统机构的配置需求，为场内注入急需的流动性活水。结论：偏多。机构能否托住下跌趋势？
body_en:
The market is at a critical inflection point, shifting from range-bound chop to fresh capital inflows. Morgan Stanley launched a low-fee Bitcoin ETF, hitting $34 million in volume on day one. As a titan managing $6.2 trillion in assets, their entry validates institutional allocation demand, injecting much-needed liquidity into the ecosystem.
Bias: Bullish.
Can institutional demand stem the downtrend?
